title: Parmesan Asparagus
instructions:
Brush the asparagus spears wit the oil; place on a baking sheet coated with olive oil cooking spray.
Bake uncovered for 6 minutes, turn the asparagus. Bake for an additional 6 minutes or until the asparagus is tender.
Combine the Parmesan and garlic salt in a small bowl and sprinkle over the asparagus.
